name: COUGAR Duoface Pro RGB Mid-Tower Computer Case - Black - Optional Tempered Glass / Mesh Front Panels - Adjustable Graphic Card Holder - 4x 120mm ARGB Fans - USB-C Gen 2 (Key A 20-pin connector) - 2x USB 3.0 - 1x USB 2.0 (385AD10.0001)
